data.title: Philippines bans Coinbase, Gemini in crackdown on unlicensed VASPs - Global exchanges need local licenses to operate.
data.description: Regulators in the Philippines are increasing restrictions on cryptocurrency access, indicating that international exchanges will need to obtain local licenses in order to conduct operations.

data.title: Father and son propose $108B hostile bid for Warner Bros. Discovery, strengthening their unexpected partnership in business.
data.description: At one point, Larry and David Ellison had a distant relationship. However, they have now formed a partnership that is gaining attention in the business world.

data.title: Kate Hudson's unexpected performance as a blue-collar mom could land her at the Oscars after years in rom-coms.
data.description: After being typecast as a romantic comedy actress for many years, she has now taken on the role of a working-class mother who adores Neil Diamond. This performance could potentially lead to her being nominated for an Academy Award.

data.title: Investors raise concerns over private equity sector as firms engage in circular deals to return cash to clients.
data.description: Private equity firms are facing challenges in selling their owned companies, leading them to resort to a strategy of selling the businesses back to themselves. This tactic allows them to recover funds for clients amidst a tough market environment.

data.title: QuickBooks Payroll named best UK payroll software by Better Business Advice, highlighting compliance and automation.
data.description: A recent acknowledgement from Better Business Advice has highlighted QuickBooks Payroll by Intuit as a top choice for UK businesses. This recognition underscores the growing trend of companies opting for software solutions that streamline compliance and automation processes. The acknowledgment reflects the increasing importance of integrating efficient tools into business operations to enhance productivity and ensure regulatory adherence.

data.title: White House ignores A.I. risks, prioritizing economic growth. Concerns include mass job losses, financial bubble. Trump backs soaring stock prices.
data.description: The concerns about mass job losses and a potential financial bubble have been downplayed by the administration, while President Trump is optimistic about the soaring stock prices and faster growth.

data.title: Deutsche Bank says heavy AI spending drives US GDP growth, projects $4 trillion on AI data centers by 2030.
data.description: Deutsche Bank analysts, Adrian Cox and Stefan Abrudan, emphasized the vital role of AI investments in the U.S. economic growth, stating that without tech spending the country would be near recession this year due to other sectors flatlining post-Covid. The bank projected that hyperscalers would spend $4 trillion on AI data centers by 2030, exceeding the inflation-adjusted cost of the U.S. moon-landing program. This significant AI expenditure underscores its importance in upholding economic stability as per the latest U.S. GDP data. Other details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trend Research- Ethereum's major player, buys 46,379 ETH, now ranks among top ETH treasuries, below SharpLink and BitMine.
data.description: After acquiring 46,379 ETH, Trend Research has jumped into a top position among ETH treasuries, ranking behind only SharpLink Gaming and BitMine Immersion Technologies in terms of holdings.

data.title: 11th Global Tourism Economy Forum in Harbin, China concluded with success. Theme: "New Quality Productive Forces".
data.description: The 11th Global Tourism Economy Forum • Heilongjiang 2025 held in Harbin, China, successfully wrapped up with the focus on "New Quality Productive Forces" powering the global tourism economy. This event attracted attention worldwide and featured discussions on advancing the tourism industry, with a special emphasis on highlighting innovative strategies and technologies. Key figures from the tourism sector, including government officials, industry leaders, and experts, gathered to exchange ideas on promoting sustainable and inclusive tourism growth. With a record attendance of over 1,000 participants, the forum provided a platform for networking and collaboration to drive positive changes in the tourism sector.

data.title: NANOscientific Symposium Series 2025 ends with celebration of 40 years of AFM at Stanford, bringing together global nanoscale community.
data.description: Recently in Stanford, the NANOscientific Symposium Series (NSS) 2025 successfully wrapped up its global program, uniting the nanoscale science and metrology community worldwide. This year-long series brought together experts and professionals from the Americas, Europe, and Asia, highlighting advancements in the field.
